D:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\C__.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\C__.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\C__.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\C__.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C__.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libC__.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\C__.dir\linkLibs.rsp
